response.step_by_step_log: Identified song "ヒトリ" (Hitori) by "かりん" (Karin) using on-screen credits. Performer is Airani Iofifteen based on the hashtag #IofiLucidDream. Used search query "ヒトリ" かりん Japanese and English lyrics to find both versions. Extracted lyrics and formatted them into the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A music video featuring a virtual character (Airani Iofifteen from Hololive) performing a song called "ヒトリ" (Hitori) while playing the piano.

scenes.description: Virtual character performs "ヒトリ" (Hitori) while playing piano, with song credits appearing on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
愛されないことは私が
一番知っていたの
それでもあなたはこの痛みに
意味を与えてくれたから
壊れてしまう恋だとしても
信じたいと思えたんだよ
あなたなら私の全て
分かってくれる気がした

あなたを愛しすぎてしまう前に
あなたを全て知る前に
空に願う
どうか未来があるように

今はそう、一人泣いてるの
小さな私の手に重ねた
あなたの大きな手
失いたくないと願うほど
苦しくなっていたの
首についた真っ赤な愛が
消える前にあなたに
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I knew best that I wouldn't be loved
Even so, you gave meaning to this pain
Even if it's a love that will break
I was able to think I wanted to believe
I felt like you would understand everything about me

Before I loved you too much
Before I knew everything about you
I wish to the sky
Please, let there be a future

Now that's right, I'm crying alone
Your big hand
Overlapping on my small hand
The more I wished not to lose it
The more painful it became
Before the bright red love on my neck
Disappears, to you...
